LightningComponentBundle.description: "Shop Parts by Product Line" responsive card grid for the B2B Connect home page.

property.name: subheading
property.label: Subheading
property.default: Select your Capsa Healthcare product to browse available replacement parts, accessories, and supplies

property.name: cardsJson
property.label: Cards (JSON array)
property.description: Optional override. JSON array of objects: {title, categoryName (defaults to title, resolved to the category id at run time), image (file in capsaCategoryImages) or imageUrl}. Leave blank to use the built-in Capsa product lines.
